The FBDM Process

A proven framework for strategic foresight in education

1

Identify

Scan environment, identify trends, gather data

2

Analyze

Cross-impact analysis, stakeholder mapping

3

Predict

Monte Carlo simulations, scenario development

4

Act

Strategy selection, action planning, monitoring
